title: Legal notice
seoDescription: Multilingual legal notice template pending legal review.
intro: This legal notice is a multilingual technical base and requires legal validation before publication.

sections.heading: Website ownership
body: Add only owner details that have been confirmed for the new website.
Do not automatically reuse tax data from the previous site without explicit confirmation.

sections.heading: Terms of use
body: Define access, use and liability conditions according to the real scope of the published website.
Review external links, forms and third-party resources before fixing the final text.

pendingReviewNote: Pending full legal review before publication.
